description: Add ArtifactKind::LspServer and ArtifactKind::Extension enum variants with emitter support
steps: Add LspServer variant to ArtifactKind enum in crates/libaipm/src/migrate/mod.rs
Add Extension variant to ArtifactKind enum in crates/libaipm/src/migrate/mod.rs
Update ArtifactKind::to_type_string() — LspServer returns 'lsp', Extension returns 'composite'
Add LspServer match arm in emitter.rs emit_plugin() calling emit_lsp_config()
Add Extension match arm in emitter.rs emit_plugin() calling emit_extension_files()
Implement emit_lsp_config() — write lsp.json from raw_content to plugin dir
Implement emit_extension_files() — copy extension files under extensions/<name>/ in plugin dir
Add LspServer and Extension arms in emit_plugin_with_name() dispatch
Add LspServer and Extension arms in emit_package_plugin() dispatch
Update plugin.json generation to support type 'lsp' for LspServer artifacts
Add unit tests for emit_lsp_config() with MockFs
Add unit tests for emit_extension_files() with MockFs
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace
Verify all existing tests still pass with the new enum variants

description: Extract shared skill logic into skill_common.rs module
steps: Create crates/libaipm/src/migrate/skill_common.rs module
Move parse_skill_frontmatter() from skill_detector.rs to skill_common.rs as pub function
Move collect_files_recursive() from skill_detector.rs to skill_common.rs as pub function
Refactor extract_script_references() to accept a variable_prefix parameter (e.g., '${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}/' or '${SKILL_DIR}/')
Move the parameterized extract_script_references() to skill_common.rs as pub function
Update skill_detector.rs SkillDetector to import and call skill_common functions with '${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}/' prefix
Add pub mod skill_common to crates/libaipm/src/migrate/mod.rs
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace to verify refactor is behavior-preserving
Verify all existing skill_detector tests still pass unchanged
Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Refactor discover_claude_dirs() into generic discover_source_dirs() with parameterized patterns
steps: Add source_type: String field to DiscoveredSource struct in discovery.rs
Rename claude_dir field to source_dir in DiscoveredSource struct
Create discover_source_dirs(project_root, patterns: &[&str], max_depth) function that accepts multiple directory name patterns
Implement single-walk logic using ignore crate that matches any pattern in the patterns slice
Populate source_type from the matched directory name (e.g., '.claude', '.github')
Keep .ai/ exclusion filter
Update discover_claude_dirs() to delegate to discover_source_dirs(root, &['.claude'], max_depth)
Update all call sites in mod.rs migrate_recursive() to use the new source_dir field name
Update all existing discovery tests to use the renamed fields
Add new tests: discover finds both .claude/ and .github/ dirs when patterns = &['.claude', '.github']
Add test: source_type is correctly populated for each discovered directory
Add test: .github/ directories at root have package_name = None
Add test: nested .github/ directories derive correct package_name
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Refactor source-type dispatch to remove hard-coded .claude gating and run all detector sets
steps: Add detectors_for_source(source_type: &str) function to detector.rs that returns claude_detectors() for '.claude' and copilot_detectors() for '.github', empty Vec for unknown
Update migrate_single_source() in mod.rs to run both claude_detectors() and copilot_detectors() against the provided path instead of matching on source name
Remove the UnsupportedSource error return for non-.claude sources in migrate_single_source()
Update migrate_recursive() to call discover_source_dirs() with &['.claude', '.github'] patterns
Update migrate_recursive() to dispatch detectors based on DiscoveredSource::source_type
Update the UnsupportedSource error message to mention .github as a supported source
Add test: --source .github no longer returns UnsupportedSource error
Add test: --source .claude still works identically to current behavior
Add test: --source pointing to an arbitrary path runs detectors without error
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Implement CopilotSkillDetector — thin wrapper delegating to shared skill_common logic
steps: Create crates/libaipm/src/migrate/copilot_skill_detector.rs
Define CopilotSkillDetector unit struct implementing Detector trait
Implement name() returning 'copilot-skill'
Implement detect() scanning <source_dir>/skills/ for subdirs containing SKILL.md
Delegate to skill_common::parse_skill_frontmatter() for frontmatter parsing
Delegate to skill_common::collect_files_recursive() for file collection
Call skill_common::extract_script_references() with both '${SKILL_DIR}/' and '${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}/' prefixes
Output ArtifactKind::Skill artifacts
Add pub mod copilot_skill_detector to mod.rs
Add unit test: detect skill from .github/skills/<name>/SKILL.md
Add unit test: empty skills dir returns empty vec
Add unit test: no skills dir returns empty vec
Add unit test: skill with frontmatter name overrides directory name
Add unit test: skill without frontmatter uses directory name
Add unit test: script references with ${SKILL_DIR}/ are extracted
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Implement CopilotAgentDetector — scans .agent.md and .md with dedup precedence
steps: Create crates/libaipm/src/migrate/copilot_agent_detector.rs
Define CopilotAgentDetector unit struct implementing Detector trait
Implement name() returning 'copilot-agent'
Implement detect() scanning <source_dir>/agents/ for .md and .agent.md files
Implement dedup logic: collect files into HashMap<stem, (path, filename)> where .agent.md overwrites .md
Strip .agent.md or .md suffix for name derivation
Parse frontmatter for name and description using same logic as AgentDetector (reuse strip_yaml_quotes)
Store full file content in ArtifactMetadata::raw_content for extra Copilot fields passthrough
Fall back to filename stem when frontmatter name is absent
Output ArtifactKind::Agent artifacts
Add pub mod copilot_agent_detector to mod.rs
Add unit test: detect .agent.md file with frontmatter
Add unit test: detect .md file when no .agent.md exists
Add unit test: .agent.md takes precedence when both foo.md and foo.agent.md exist
Add unit test: no agents dir returns empty vec
Add unit test: empty agents dir returns empty vec
Add unit test: skips directories and non-.md files
Add unit test: malformed frontmatter (missing closing ---) returns error
Add unit test: no frontmatter uses filename stem as name
Add unit test: multiple agents detected and returned
Add unit test: quoted frontmatter values are stripped
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Implement CopilotMcpDetector — reads .copilot/mcp-config.json with transport passthrough
steps: Create crates/libaipm/src/migrate/copilot_mcp_detector.rs
Define CopilotMcpDetector unit struct implementing Detector trait
Implement name() returning 'copilot-mcp'
Implement detect(): derive project root via source_dir.parent()
Check for .copilot/mcp-config.json at project root (Copilot-specific path only)
Parse JSON and validate mcpServers key exists and is non-empty object
Count servers for description string
Store full JSON content in ArtifactMetadata::raw_content — pass through transport types as-is
Output ArtifactKind::McpServer artifact named 'copilot-mcp-servers'
Add pub mod copilot_mcp_detector to mod.rs
Add unit test: detect valid .copilot/mcp-config.json with 'local' transport
Add unit test: detect valid .copilot/mcp-config.json with 'stdio' transport
Add unit test: no .copilot/mcp-config.json returns empty vec
Add unit test: empty mcpServers returns empty vec
Add unit test: malformed JSON returns ConfigParse error
Add unit test: no mcpServers key returns empty vec
Add unit test: project root derivation from source_dir
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Implement CopilotHookDetector — reads standalone hooks.json with legacy event name normalization
steps: Create crates/libaipm/src/migrate/copilot_hook_detector.rs
Define CopilotHookDetector unit struct implementing Detector trait
Implement name() returning 'copilot-hook'
Implement detect(): check <source_dir>/hooks.json first, then <source_dir>/hooks/hooks.json
Parse JSON and validate it contains hook event keys

Implement normalize_hook_event_name() mapping legacy names to canonical: SessionStart->sessionStart, SessionEnd->sessionEnd, UserPromptSubmit->userPromptSubmitted, PreToolUse->preToolUse, PostToolUse->postToolUse, PostToolUseFailure->errorOccurred, ErrorOccurred->errorOccurred, Stop->agentStop, SubagentStop->subagentStop, PreCompact->preCompact
Normalize all top-level keys in the hooks JSON object before storing in raw_content
Merge arrays when both legacy and canonical keys map to the same canonical name
Extract script references reusing hook_detector logic (extract_hook_script_references or equivalent)
Output ArtifactKind::Hook artifact named 'copilot-hooks'
Add pub mod copilot_hook_detector to mod.rs
Add unit test: detect standalone hooks.json at source_dir root
Add unit test: detect hooks/hooks.json in subdirectory
Add unit test: hooks.json takes priority when both exist
Add unit test: legacy event name SessionStart normalized to sessionStart
Add unit test: legacy name UserPromptSubmit normalized to userPromptSubmitted
Add unit test: legacy name Stop normalized to agentStop
Add unit test: already-canonical names pass through unchanged
Add unit test: no hooks files returns empty vec
Add unit test: malformed JSON returns error
Add unit test: script references extracted from command hooks
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings
Create crates/libaipm/src/migrate/copilot_extension_detector.rs
Define CopilotExtensionDetector unit struct implementing Detector trait
Implement name() returning 'copilot-extension'
Implement detect(): scan <source_dir>/extensions/ for subdirectories
For each subdirectory, treat it as an extension — derive name from directory name
Read any JSON or YAML config files found in the extension directory
Store config content in ArtifactMetadata::raw_content
Collect all files recursively within the extension directory
Output ArtifactKind::Extension artifacts
Add pub mod copilot_extension_detector to mod.rs
Add unit test: detect extension subdirectory with config file
Add unit test: detect multiple extensions
Add unit test: empty extensions dir returns empty vec
Add unit test: no extensions dir returns empty vec
Add unit test: skips non-directory entries in extensions/
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Implement CopilotLspDetector — reads lsp.json for future-proofing
steps: Create crates/libaipm/src/migrate/copilot_lsp_detector.rs
Define CopilotLspDetector unit struct implementing Detector trait
Implement name() returning 'copilot-lsp'
Implement detect(): check <source_dir>/lsp.json first, then derive project root and check .github/lsp.json
Parse JSON and validate it contains LSP server definitions (non-empty object)
Count servers for description string
Store full JSON in ArtifactMetadata::raw_content
Output ArtifactKind::LspServer artifact named 'copilot-lsp-servers'
Add pub mod copilot_lsp_detector to mod.rs
Add unit test: detect valid lsp.json at source_dir
Add unit test: detect .github/lsp.json fallback
Add unit test: no lsp.json returns empty vec
Add unit test: malformed JSON returns ConfigParse error
Add unit test: empty object returns empty vec
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Add copilot_detectors() factory function and wire up module registration
steps: Add all 6 pub mod declarations for copilot detectors to crates/libaipm/src/migrate/mod.rs
Add copilot_detectors() function to detector.rs returning Vec<Box<dyn Detector>> with all 6 Copilot detectors
Verify copilot_detectors() returns CopilotSkillDetector, CopilotAgentDetector, CopilotMcpDetector, CopilotHookDetector, CopilotExtensionDetector, CopilotLspDetector
Add unit test: copilot_detectors() returns exactly 6 detectors
Add unit test: each detector has the expected name()
Run cargo build --workspace && cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Integration test — end-to-end migrate with mixed .claude/ and .github/ project
steps: Create integration test in crates/libaipm/src/migrate/mod.rs tests module
Set up MockFs with both .claude/ and .github/ directories containing artifacts
Add .claude/skills/deploy/SKILL.md with frontmatter
Add .github/skills/lint/SKILL.md with frontmatter
Add .github/agents/reviewer.agent.md with frontmatter
Add .copilot/mcp-config.json with mcpServers using 'local' transport
Run migrate() with --source .claude and verify Claude artifacts detected
Run migrate() with --source .github and verify Copilot artifacts detected
Verify name conflict resolution works when both sources have same-named artifacts
Verify marketplace.json is updated with all migrated plugins
Verify dry-run mode includes Copilot artifacts in report
Run cargo test --workspace

description: Integration test — recursive discovery with nested .github/ directories
steps: Create integration test using tempdir with real filesystem
Set up directory tree: root/.github/, packages/auth/.github/, packages/api/.claude/
Add skill/agent/hook artifacts in each directory
Run discover_source_dirs() with patterns &['.claude', '.github']
Verify all 3 source directories discovered
Verify source_type correctly identifies each as '.claude' or '.github'
Verify package_name derivation for nested dirs
Verify root-level dirs have package_name = None
Verify results are sorted by path
Run cargo test --workspace

description: Verify branch coverage >= 89% for all new code
steps: Run cargo +nightly llvm-cov clean --workspace
Run cargo +nightly llvm-cov --no-report --workspace --branch
Run cargo +nightly llvm-cov --no-report --doc
Run cargo +nightly llvm-cov report --doctests --branch --ignore-filename-regex '(tests/|research/|specs/|wizard_tty\.rs)'
Verify TOTAL branch coverage shows >= 89%
If below threshold, identify uncovered branches in new detector code
Add targeted tests for any uncovered branches
Re-run coverage until >= 89% threshold met
Run cargo fmt --check to verify formatting
Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings for final lint check
Run cargo build --workspace for clean build verification
